text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's scrimmage is an exercise designed to
serve as a rehearsal for a real G1 race, with
participants even wearing their signature
racewear. Opportunities like this don't come
often, and yet...

text_block_list.name: Senior Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Mejiro Ardan's trainer! I just had a look at the
track, but it's still all mucky from the rain.
choice_data_list: I was afraid of that...

text_block_list.name: Senior Trainer
text_block_list.text:
There's a chill in the air too. I'm going to withdraw
my Umamusume from this one. Passing up this
opportunity hurts, but still...

text_block_list.name: Senior Trainer
text_block_list.text:
If I remember right... your racer's not the burliest
around, is she? I'd err on the side of caution if I
were you. ...Well, see ya later.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Greetings, Trainer. Did I hear the word "withdraw"
just now?
choice_data_list: Yeah, they're worried about you.
Yeah, they're worried about you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I see... It's kind of them to look out for my
well-being.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
To race or not to race... Have you come to a
decision, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Is it okay for me to make the call?
Is it okay for me to make the call?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes, by all means.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...What to do?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The experience she'd get would be invaluable,
and she looked great during the warm-ups. I
struggle to think of a reason to stop her from
racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then again, if she's putting on a brave face... Just
to be sure, I ask Mejiro Ardan how she's feeling.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I'll be absolutely fine. As long as I run for this moment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...I've no doubt that I'll be able to run my very
best. I assure you I will.
choice_data_list: Understood... Then, let's run.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...And you're sure about this?
choice_data_list: Yes. I trust that the moment is yours, Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Thank you very much. In that case, I'll hold
nothing back—for I shall entertain no regrets.
choice_data_list: Do your best!
Do your best!

text_block_list.name: Energetic Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Let's do our best out there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'm looking forward to this race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(Mingling in with so many Umamusume dressed in
their signature racewear brings back memories...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(Come to think of it, it took quite some time for
me to don my signature racewear after becoming
race-ready.)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Proudly sporting their signature racewear, the
competing Umamusume are now entering the
starting gate!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
How beautiful... Thank you for bringing me along,
Nanny.

text_block_list.name: Ardan's Nanny
text_block_list.text:
It's my pleasure. But you mustn't forget that you
only just got out of the hospital, so no running
around, okay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes... I understand.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(That pride, that light... How long must I wait to
know their embrace?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(I swore to myself that no matter what, I would
someday wear such an outfit myself. But it would
be a lie to say that I was not envious. And now...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The gate opens with a bang. The atmosphere is
heavy beneath the overcast sky, but her racewear
flutters vividly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (Now... I wear this outfit to race!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(You lit the spark. That means this clothing also
serves as proof of your faith in me.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(I wish to prove that I am worthy of it—of that
pride, and that light!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Phew!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Pant... I've, I've lost!
choice_data_list:
But you did great! ...It sure was muddy out
there.

But you did great! ...It sure was muddy out
there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Hehe. It really was. My clothes are filthy
but...
choice_data_list: That was your first step toward victory.
That was your first step toward victory.
But?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Hehe. It really was. My clothes are filthy
but...
choice_data_list: That was your first step toward victory.
That was your first step toward victory.
But?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...! ...Hehehe. I was thinking exactly the same
thing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I shall etch this defeat onto my heart. But I didn't
run from the contest, I fought. And I raced in the
moment, in the now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
This experience will surely fuel my resolve. I will
strive even harder. And I...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...I thank you, for having faith in me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I entrust you... with my future endeavors.
choice_data_list: I'm looking forward to working with you too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I want to continue living up to her expectations,
and be a trainer worthy of her trust... Today has
renewed my resolve!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Somehow, I feel... rather refreshed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I might be covered in mud and soaked to the
bone... but I managed to keep running. And that's
because you had faith in me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
So, Trainer? Moving forward... I think it might be
difficult for anyone to stop me.
choice_data_list: Yeah, let's give it our all next time, too!
Yeah, let's give it our all next time, too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: With pleasure!
